subcodes.first_line: O My leaf and mother of My Afnán, upon him rest forever the glory of God, and His bounty and His mercy, in both the heavens and the earth!
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی یا ام افنانی علیکم بهاء الله و عنایته و رحمته التی سبقت من فی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @predictions and prophecies, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
